type: PPT
---

::: {#page1 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr3 style="height:4.445cm;width:19.685cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:4.007cm; "}
<div>

1.  AITI Tutorial:\
    Internationalization

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr4 style="height:2.752cm;width:15.663cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.349cm; top:9.948cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Coding for the world]{.text-T6}

    [MIT AITI ]{.text-T7}

    [July NNth, 2005]{.text-T7}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page2 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  What is Internationalization?

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Internationalization:]{.text-T8}[
    ]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[Designing
        applications to easily support different languages and
        regions.]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[Abbreviated
        as
        "]{.text-T10}[I18N]{.text-T11}["]{.text-T12}[.]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[(There
        are 18 letters between 'I' and 'N').]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Localization]{.text-T13}[:]{.text-T8}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[Adapting
        software to a specific region.]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[Abbreviated
        as
        ]{.text-T10}["]{.text-T12}[L10N]{.text-T14}["]{.text-T12}[.]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{.text-T10}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr8 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page3 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Why do we care?

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Translation:]{.text-T15}[
    Don't want to have to search through many files for wos to
    translate.]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Date
    Formats:]{.text-T13}[ Is "7/6/5" July 6th, 2005, June 7th, 2005, or
    June 5th, 2007?]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Currency
    Formats:]{.text-T8}[ Is nine thousand
    dollars]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [        ]{.text-T9}[9 000,00, 9.000,00, or \$9,000.00?]{.text-T9}

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Non-Latin
    Characters: ]{.text-T16}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[Spanish:
        ¡Viva España! ]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[Chinese:
        ]{.text-T17}[早晨好]{.text-T18}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[Arabic:
        ]{.text-T19}[هـ]{.text-T19}[ -
        ]{.text-T10}[الموافق]{.text-T19}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm"}[]{.text-T19}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page4 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Properties of I18N.

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}Same
    executable can be run worldwide with different local
    data.[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}Text
    elements are not hard-coded.[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}Should not
    have to recompile to add new languages.[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}Dates and
    currencies stored in region independent format.[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}Localizes
    easily.[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page5 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Example Non-I18N Program

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [public class]{.text-T20}[ NotI18N {]{.text-T21}

    [ ]{.text-T21}[static public void
    ]{.text-T20}[main(]{.text-T21}[String]{.text-T22}[\[\]
    args){]{.text-T21}

    [       
    ]{.text-T21}[System.out.println]{.text-T20}[(]{.text-T21}[\"Hello\"]{.text-T23}[);]{.text-T21}

    [       
    ]{.text-T21}[System.out.println]{.text-T20}[(]{.text-T21}["Thank
    you\"]{.text-T23}[);      ]{.text-T21}

    [ ]{.text-T21}[}]{.text-T21}

    [}]{.text-T21}

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[What if we
    want to ship this software to 70 different countries?
    ]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page6 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Locales

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Locales:]{.text-T15}[
    Objects that identify a particular language and
    region.]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Locale]{.text-T13}[(]{.text-T9}[String]{.text-T13}[
    country, ]{.text-T9}[String]{.text-T13}[
    lang);]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Static
    Locales: ]{.text-T9}[Locale.US, Locale.Japan, Locale.UK,
    Locale.PRC]{.text-T13}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Two-letter
    country and language codes. ]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Locale]{.text-T22}[
    swahiliKenya; ]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [        ]{.text-T21}[swahiliKenya = ]{.text-T21}[new]{.text-T20}[
    ]{.text-T21}[Locale]{.text-T22}[(]{.text-T21}["sw"]{.text-T23}[,
    ]{.text-T21}["KE"]{.text-T23}[);]{.text-T21}

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Locale]{.text-T22}[
    arabicIraq;]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [        ]{.text-T21}[arabicIraq = ]{.text-T21}[new]{.text-T20}[
    ]{.text-T21}[Locale]{.text-T22}[(]{.text-T21}["ar"]{.text-T23}[,
    ]{.text-T21}["IQ"]{.text-T23}[);]{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page7 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Check for Supported Locales

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Not every
    Locale will be supported.]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Can check
    which Locales are available:]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [import java.util.\*;]{.text-T24}

    [import java.text.DateFormat;]{.text-T24}

    []{.text-T24}

    [public class]{.text-T25}[ Available {]{.text-T24}

    [ ]{.text-T24}[static public void
    main]{.text-T25}[(]{.text-T24}[String]{.text-T26}[\[ args)
    {]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[Locale]{.text-T26}[ list\[\];]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[list =
    ]{.text-T24}[DateFormat]{.text-T26}[.getAvailableLocales();]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[for]{.text-T25}[
    (]{.text-T24}[int]{.text-T26}[ i = 0; i \<
    list.]{.text-T24}[length]{.text-T25}[; i++)]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[  
     ]{.text-T24}[System.out.println]{.text-T25}[(list\[i\].toString());]{.text-T24}

    [ ]{.text-T24}[}]{.text-T24}

    [}]{.text-T24}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page8 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Resource Bundles

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[We want to
    isolate Locale-specifc data, like text
    strings.]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Resource
    Bundle]{.text-T8}[:]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[Look up
        Locale-specific objects with a key.]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[ListResourceBundle]{.text-T27}[:
        2D key/value array.]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[PropertyResourceBundle]{.text-T27}[:
        Flat text file.]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[We'll deal
    with plain text properties files: Look up with a string, get back a
    string.]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[If you need
    to look up an object, you'd use a
    ]{.text-T9}[ListResourceBundle]{.text-T13}[.]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  []{.text-T9}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page9 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Properties Files

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Example
    properties files:]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[\#
    Labels.properties]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  [hello = Hello]{.text-T21}

        [thanks = Thank You]{.text-T21}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[\#
    Labels_sw.properties ]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  [hello = Jambo]{.text-T21}

        [thanks = Asante]{.text-T21}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[\#
    Labels_es.properties]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [        ]{.text-T21}[hello = Hola]{.text-T21}

    [        ]{.text-T21}[thanks = Gracias]{.text-T21}

-   1.  []{.text-T21}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page10 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Creating Resource Bundles

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.482cm;"}[ResourceBundles
    ]{.text-T27}[are created by giving a ]{.text-T10}[base
    name]{.text-T12}[ and optionally a locale.
    ]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.482cm;"}[ResourceBundle]{.text-T26}[
    labels =
    ]{.text-T24}[ResourceBundle]{.text-T26}[.getBundle]{.text-T24}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[(]{.text-T24}["Labels\"]{.text-T28}[,
    currentLocale);]{.text-T24}

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.482cm;"}[If
    currentLocale is "sw_KE" and default is "en_US", it will search
    files in this order:]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [¡]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.27cm;"}[Labels_sw_KE.properties]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [¡]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.27cm;"}[Labels_sw.properties]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [¡]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.27cm;"}[Labels_en_US.properties]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [¡]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.27cm;"}[Labels_en.properties]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [¡]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.27cm;"}[Labels.properties]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page11 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Using Resource Bundles

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

1.  [static void]{.text-T25}[
    printMessages(]{.text-T24}[Locale]{.text-T26}[ currentLocale)
    {]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[ResourceBundle]{.text-T26}[ labels =
    ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[ResourceBundle.getBundle]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[(]{.text-T24}[\"Labels\"]{.text-T28}[,
    currentLocale);]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[System.out.println]{.text-T25}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[(\"Current Locale is \" +]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[currentLocale.getDisplayName());]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T25}[       
    ]{.text-T25}[System.out.println]{.text-T25}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[(labels.getString(\"hello\"));]{.text-T24}

    [        ]{.text-T25}[       
    ]{.text-T25}[System.out.println]{.text-T25}

    [        ]{.text-T24}[        ]{.text-T24}[       
    ]{.text-T24}[(labels.getString(\"thanks\"));]{.text-T24}

    [    ]{.text-T24}[}]{.text-T24}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page12 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  What about China?

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}A few
    billion people do not use the Latin alphabet.[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}But your
    keyboard is likely to use it. []{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}How do we
    type Chinese, Japanese, Arabic, Thai, Cyrillic, etc., characters in
    our properties files?[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page13 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Character Representation

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Characters
    are often represented by fixed-width, 8-bit bytes, esp.
    C/C++.]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[This only
    allows for 256 characters.]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Unicode:
    ]{.text-T30}[Character encoding that supports 1,114,112 different
    symbols.]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Can
    represent any Unicode characters with
    3-bytes.]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Java has
    default Unicode support.]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page14 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Ethiopic Unicode Characters

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr17 .graphic-P34 style="height:13.621cm;width:23.954cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.723cm; top:4.657cm; "}
![](data:image/png;base64,){style="height:13.621cm;width:23.954cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P35 .graphic-pr10 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

1.  [This is just a portion of the Ethiopic alphabet. It ranges from
    \\u1200-\\u12BF. The left-most column are the first five Ethopic
    characters \\u1200, \\u1201, etc.]{.text-T29}

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page15 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Many Unicode Formats

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Most
    Unicode characters are rarely used.]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Programmers
    don't want to waste space with 3-byte
    representations.]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[There are
    many different ways to represent Unicode
    characters.]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Official:
    UTF-8, UTF-16, UTF-32.]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Unofficial:
    UCS-2, UCS-4.]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Java uses
    UCS-2 (very close to UTF-16).]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[(We can
    mostly ignore these details.)]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page16 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Using Unicode in Java

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Unicode
    characters can be represented using regular
    plaintext.]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Characters
    are represented as '\\uNNNN'.]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[4-digit
    character codes can be found at:
    ]{.text-T9}[<http://www.unicode.org/charts/>]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Encoding
    the character '©':]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[The
        Unicode value for '©' is 00A9 in hex
        (169).]{.text-T10}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[String]{.text-T22}[
        str =
        ]{.text-T21}[\"\\u00A9\"]{.text-T23}[;]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.221cm;"}[char]{.text-T22}[
        c =
        ]{.text-T21}[\'\\u00A9\']{.text-T23}[;]{.text-T21}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Need GUI or
    terminal that supports Unicode.]{.text-T9}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page17 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Unicode Demo in Swing

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:4.868cm; "}
<div>

1.  [import javax.swing]{.text-T33}[.\*;]{.text-T34}

    []{.text-T34}

    [public class]{.text-T33}[ ]{.text-T34}[UnicodeDemo]{.text-T35}[
    ]{.text-T34}[extends]{.text-T33}[ ]{.text-T34}[JFrame]{.text-T35}[
    {]{.text-T34}

    [  ]{.text-T34}[public static void]{.text-T33}[
    main(]{.text-T34}[String]{.text-T35}[\[\] Args) {]{.text-T34}

    [        ]{.text-T34}[UnicodeDemo]{.text-T35}[ app =
    ]{.text-T34}[new]{.text-T33}[
    ]{.text-T34}[UnicodeDemo]{.text-T35}[();]{.text-T34}

    [        ]{.text-T34}[app.setSize(100,100);]{.text-T34}

    [        ]{.text-T34}[JLabel]{.text-T35}[ label = ]{.text-T34}

    [        ]{.text-T34}[new JLabel(]{.text-T34}[\"Copyright \\u00A9
    2005\"]{.text-T36}[,
    ]{.text-T34}[JLabel]{.text-T35}[.CENTER);]{.text-T34}

    [        ]{.text-T34}[app.getContentPane().add(label);]{.text-T34}

    [        ]{.text-T34}[app.setTitle(]{.text-T34}[\"Unicode
    Demo\"]{.text-T36}[);]{.text-T34}

    [       
    ]{.text-T34}[app.setDefaultCloseOperation(]{.text-T34}[JFrame]{.text-T35}[.EXIT_ON_CLOSE);]{.text-T34}

    [        ]{.text-T34}[app.setVisible(true);]{.text-T34}

    [  ]{.text-T34}[}]{.text-T34}

    [}]{.text-T34}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page18 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Demo Output

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr17 .graphic-P34 style="height:12.184cm;width:20.955cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.223cm; top:5.503cm; "}
![](data:image/png;base64,){style="height:12.184cm;width:20.955cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page19 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr6 style="height:3.136cm;width:19.883cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.588cm; top:1.058cm; "}
<div>

1.  Pop Quiz: Review Terms

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.43cm;width:21.281cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.636cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Internationalization
    (I18N)]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Localization
    (L10N)]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Locales]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[ResourceBundles]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Properties
    Files]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[Unicode]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:1.244cm;"}[UCS-2]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P25 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.43cm;width:13.97cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.54cm; top:12.065cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::
